message: Master redis-primary-01 unreachable. Initiating failover check. quorum=2/3
New master elected: redis-replica-02. Notifying all clients.
New master redis-replica-02 unreachable after promotion. Split-brain detected? Re-initiating failover.
Failover loop detected. Master election cycling every 3-5 seconds. All sessions being invalidated on each cycle.
ALERT FIRING: RedisSessionInvalidationRate - 92.3% of sessions invalid. Users being logged out en masse. Severity=P1
Session lookup failed: MOVED error from Redis. Master address changing every few seconds.
ALERT RESOLVED: Redis Sentinel stabilized after network partition resolved. INC-006 closed.
